description_long: This is a tracked combat vehicle with a long, forward-facing cannon mounted on a rotating turret. The exterior is covered in angular armor plating and features a distinctive camouflage paint scheme in shades of brown and black. The vehicle has a low, wide profile with visible track systems on both sides, and several hatches and periscopes are present on the turret and hull. A machine gun is mounted on top of the turret, and the front of the vehicle is reinforced with sloped armor. Military insignia are visible on the sides of the hull. The overall design suggests a heavily armored, mobile platform intended for urban or battlefield deployment.
description: A heavily armored tracked combat vehicle with a long cannon, camouflage paint, and visible military insignia. Features include a rotating turret, machine gun mount, and reinforced sloped armor.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the cannon, the camouflage pattern, track system, and military insignia on the hull.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back armor, exhaust system, and the width of the tracks.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the turret, cannon, camouflage, and track system, with insignia visible.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the sloped frontal armor, cannon barrel, and the vehicle's low, wide stance.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the turret front, one machine gun mount on top of the turret.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with sloped and reinforced sections on the front and turret; appears thick and robust.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Desert camouflage pattern with irregular brown and black patches in a blotchy style.
attribute_military_markings: Black and white cross insignia on the sides of the hull.
